title: Seedless
description: stops the display of the world seed in the debug screen in b1.8-1.2.5 (ornithe)
body:
stops the display of the world seed in the debug screen in b1.8-1.2.5

uses ornithe intermediaries, 
you can generate an instance for vanilla or multimc / prism with the [ornithe installer](https://github.com/OrnitheMC/ornithe-installer) there is a premade instance for 1.0.0 on the [mcsr legacy fabric instances](https://github.com/Minecraft-Java-Edition-Speedrunning/legacy-fabric-instance-generator/releases).
